summary: Prashnakosh RC1 Final Freeze Testing - All features verified working. Backend: 20/20 tests passed. Frontend: All dashboards working after fixing HOD dashboard bug. Seed idempotency confirmed via backend logs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: RC1 Final Freeze testing completed. Key findings: 1) seedSuperAdmin() idempotent behavior confirmed - logs show '[seed] Super Admin already exists — skipping seed', 2) All login flows work (Super Admin, HOD, Teacher), 3) Fixed HOD dashboard bug where allQuestions.filter was failing because API returns {questions: [...]} but code expected array directly, 4) Super Admin dashboard shows Storage card with 'Manage local storage - UPLOADS • EXPORTS • BACKUPS', 5) Teacher dashboard shows Upload Questions with subject auto-assigned, 6) HOD dashboard shows Review & Approve Questions with Total Questions: 22 (Pending: 7 | Approved: 15).

seed_idempotency.log_message: [seed] Super Admin already exists — skipping seed
seed_idempotency.behavior: Seed checks for ANY existing super_admin role user and skips if found

super_admin_dashboard.storage_card_text: Manage local storage - UPLOADS • EXPORTS • BACKUPS

bug_fixed.issue: allQuestions.filter is not a function - API returns {questions: [...]} but code expected array directly
